items.title: Architecture Fundamentals
items.description: Core principles of distributed systems architecture including CAP theorem, consistency models, availability, partition tolerance, and key trade-offs every engineer must understand.

items.title: Docker Fundamentals
items.description: Core Docker concepts for beginners — containers vs virtual machines, images, layers, the image registry, container lifecycle, and the Docker architecture.

items.title: Java Fundamentals: Core Language Concepts
items.description: Covers Java fundamentals, including the platform model, syntax, types, control flow, and essential language concepts.

items.title: Relational Fundamentals
items.description: Core concepts of relational databases — tables, keys, joins, SQL basics, and the relational model.
